Antique Teacup.Description: A vintage teacup with delicate patterns, holding the echoes of many warm conversations and sips of tea.

Ash.Description: The soft, powdery remnants of a fire that once burned brightly.

Azurite.Description: A brilliant blue stone that sparkles with the colors of the sky, a symbol of wisdom and clarity.

Branch Dead.Description: A lifeless branch, fallen to the ground after many years of standing tall.

Candy Cane.Description: Bright red and white stripes twist together in a festive curve, carrying the sweet scent of winter cheer. A simple holiday treat that feels like Christmas folded into candy.

Coal Hard.Description: A dense, compact piece of coal, perfect for a long, slow burn.

Coconut Oil.Description: A tropical oil with a smooth texture and subtle flavor, used for cooking, skincare, and everything in between.

Coral Stone.Description: A smooth, pinkish stone formed by coral, a symbol of the vibrant life beneath the waves.

Fishbone.Description: A slender, sharp bone from a fish, often left behind after a meal.

Foxtail.Description: A soft, fluffy tail that twitches with every movement, often belonging to a fox or similar creature.

Gold Ore.Description: A shiny mineral that's both rare and valuable, a symbol of wealth just waiting to be mined.

Gravion Chunk.Description: A solid mass of Gravion, sturdy but unworked.

Gravion Crystal.Description: A flawless block of Gravion, famed for unmatched defense.

Gravion Shard.Description: Rough fragments of Gravion, heavy and irregular.

Ingot Iron.Description: A strong, dense block of iron, perfect for forging tools and weapons.

Ingot Steel.Description: A refined steel ingot, tough and durable, used in the creation of many valuable items.

Larva.Description: A tiny, wriggling creature that will soon transform into something much more impressive.

Leaf.Description: A green, delicate leaf that flutters in the wind, a symbol of nature's endless cycle.

Lunaris Chunk.Description: A smooth Lunaris chunk, shimmering with quiet magic.

Lunaris Crystal.Description: A pristine Lunaris crystal, radiant with celestial energy.

Lunaris Shard.Description: Pale lunar fragments that glow faintly in darkness.

Moonrock.Description: A mysterious rock, as if it's traveled all the way from the moon itself.

Moonstone.Description: Glimmering with an ethereal glow, it's like holding a piece of moonlight.

Mushroom.Description: Soft and earthy, this little fungus grows in the shadows of the forest floor.

Obsidian.Description: A sleek, glass-like stone, smooth as night and sharp as a shadow.

Oceanite.Description: A stone as deep as the ocean, swirling with shades of blue and green.

Pouch Fairy Dust.Description: A tiny pouch filled with magical fairy dust, ready to sprinkle some charm.

Seed.Description: A tiny promise of growth, holding potential in its fragile shell.

Silica Sand.Description: A fine, smooth sand, glistening like tiny crystals under the sun.

Spider Web.Description: Delicate and intricate, a work of art spun from nature's finest threads.

Tree Bark.Description: Rough and textured, the bark tells stories of the tree's life.

Tree Sap.Description: Sweet and sticky, it's the lifeblood of the tree, full of natural goodness.

Tungsten.Description: Strong and unyielding, a metal that refuses to bend or break.

Vulkanite Chunk.Description: A raw chunk of Vulkanite, hot with latent power.

Vulkanite Crystal.Description: A perfected Vulkanite crystal, channeling devastating force.

Vulkanite Shard.Description: Jagged splinters of Vulkanite, scorching to the touch.
